prepared_text:
Our Ref.: S/2021/JMT 
November 8, 2021 
 
 
BSE Limited 
 
 
 
 
National Stock Exchange of India Limited    
 1st Floor, Phiroze Jeejeebhoy Towers, 
Exchange Plaza, 5th Floor, Plot No. C/1, 
Dalal Street,   
 
 
 
Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (East), 
MUMBAI – 400 001 
 
 
 
Mumbai – 400 051 
 
Sub:  Written transcript of Earnings Call conducted on November 01, 2021 
 
Dear Sir / Madam, 
 
Further to our letter dated November 02, 2021, please find enclosed written transcript of 
the earnings call held on November 01, 2021. 
 
 We request you to kindly take the same on record. 
       
 Thanking You, 
 Yours faithfully, 
  For The Great Eastern Shipping Co. Ltd. 
 
 
 
  Jayesh M. Trivedi 
  President (Secl. & Legal) & Company Secretary
